note: KayKit 'Bits' packs (dungeon / resource / tools) - bulk gltf→glb conversion. Each gltf references a co-located shared texture atlas by URI, so the converter embeds the texture into every output glb (single self-contained file). type:static (geometry-safe), maxTex:512 webp. Run: node scripts/assets/build_assets.mjs scripts/assets/specs/asset_bits.json   (add --shard i/n to parallelize). Raw inputs under tmp/asset_src are gitignored; only the public/models outputs are committed.
